provenance: Merged from subset_v1_updated, remaining_v1, and warning_signs_v1 splits. Those intermediate JSON files are not shipped in this repository; only this merged release is included.

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个标准专业灭火器，整体为直立的鲜红色金属圆柱瓶身，顶部装有黑色压把、金属阀门组件和一根从顶部侧面伸出的黑色喷射软管。瓶身正面中央留有自然的大面积说明文字区域，整体轮廓紧凑、垂直、功能性明确。主体必须保持为这种标准红色灭火器的外观，保持其金属圆柱瓶身、顶部压把阀门结构、黑色软管和正面文字区位置不变。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a standard professional fire extinguisher with an upright bright-red metal cylindrical body, a black squeeze handle on top, a metal valve assembly, and a black discharge hose extending from the upper side. The center front of the cylinder contains a natural large instruction-text area, and the overall silhouette is compact, vertical, and functionally unmistakable. The subject must remain this type of standard red fire extinguisher without changing its identity, metal cylindrical body, top handle-and-valve structure, black hose, or the placement of the front text area.
cases.text_anchor_en: on the front of the extinguisher cylinder
cases.prompt_zh:
请生成一张真实感图片。

Scene:
画面主体是一个标准专业灭火器，整体为直立的鲜红色金属圆柱瓶身，顶部装有黑色压把、金属阀门组件和一根从顶部侧面伸出的黑色喷射软管。瓶身正面中央留有自然的大面积说明文字区域，整体轮廓紧凑、垂直、功能性明确。主体必须保持为这种标准红色灭火器的外观，保持其金属圆柱瓶身、顶部压把阀门结构、黑色软管和正面文字区位置不变。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：1-3
- 背景密度：低
- 镜头距离：中景

文字要求：
位于灭火器瓶身正面的主说明文字必须准确写成：“灭火器”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。
cases.prompt_en:
Please generate a realistic image.

Scene:
The main subject is a standard professional fire extinguisher with an upright bright-red metal cylindrical body, a black squeeze handle on top, a metal valve assembly, and a black discharge hose extending from the upper side. The center front of the cylinder contains a natural large instruction-text area, and the overall silhouette is compact, vertical, and functionally unmistakable. The subject must remain this type of standard red fire extinguisher without changing its identity, metal cylindrical body, top handle-and-valve structure, black hose, or the placement of the front text area.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 1-3
- Background density: low
- Camera distance: mid-shot

Text requirement:
The main instruction text on the front of the extinguisher cylinder must read exactly: "FIRE EXTINGUISHER".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

场景开放程度要求如下：

- 背景密度：低
- 镜头距离：中景

文字要求：
位于灭火器瓶身正面的主说明文字必须准确写成：“灭火器”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：
1. 除上述指定文字外，图中不要出现任何其他文字、字母、数字或标志。

4. 不要通过补充场景内容、改变主体外观或重构环境语义来使目标文字显得更合理。
5. 即使目标文字与场景语义冲突，也应保持主体和场景内容不变，并直接准确生成指定文字。

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个标准加油机的正面视图，整体为高而窄的矩形立式机身。上部设有数字显示屏，中部是按键、支付或操作面板区域，下部是取油和说明区域；机身一侧悬挂油枪，油枪连接一根较长的黑色软管，沿侧面垂落。前面板平整，正面中央或上半部分留有自然的主标识文字位。主体必须保持为这种标准加油机，不要改变其身份、矩形立式轮廓、显示面板位置、油枪与软管结构或整体设备布局。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a standard front-facing gas pump with a tall, narrow, upright rectangular body. The upper section contains a digital display screen, the middle section contains a keypad or payment/control panel, and the lower section contains the dispensing and instruction area. A fuel nozzle hangs along one side, attached to a long dark hose that falls vertically along the machine. The front panel is flat, with a natural main text position in the center or upper front section. The subject must remain this type of standard gas pump without changing its identity, upright rectangular silhouette, display placement, nozzle-and-hose structure, or overall equipment layout.

The subject must remain this type of electrical panel without changing its identity, rectangular metal door, edge frame or hinge structure, handle-lock placement, or upper warning-text area.

The center or upper front serves as the natural main label area, and the overall silhouette is thick, regular, and clearly civic in appearance. The subject must remain this type of postal drop box without changing its identity, upright metal body, top deposit slot, front access panel, or the placement of the front text area.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 4-6
- Background density: medium
- Camera distance: mid-to-far shot

Text requirement:
The main label text at the most prominent position on the front of the postal drop box must read exactly: "POST".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

场景开放程度要求如下：

文字要求：
位于投递箱正面最显眼处的主标识文字必须准确写成：“邮政”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：
1. 除上述指定文字外，图中不要出现任何其他文字、字母、数字或标志。

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个公共电话亭的正面视图，整体为高而窄的亭体结构，顶部有单独的横向主标识带，中部是开口入口或透明前面板，左右两侧为透明或半透明围挡。内部电话设备区域位于中上部，亭体轮廓垂直明确，顶部文字区是自然的主标识位置。主体必须保持为这种公共电话亭，不要改变其身份、竖直亭体轮廓、顶部主标识带、透明侧围挡或内部电话设备位置。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a front view of a public telephone booth with a tall narrow vertical enclosure. A separate horizontal sign band appears at the top, while the middle section contains an entrance opening or transparent front panel, and the left and right sides are enclosed by transparent or semi-transparent side panels. The telephone equipment is visible inside in the upper-middle area, and the top band serves as the natural main label area. The subject must remain this type of public telephone booth without changing its identity, vertical booth silhouette, top sign band, transparent side panels, or the internal telephone position.

The telephone equipment is visible inside in the upper-middle area, and the top band serves as the natural main label area. The subject must remain this type of public telephone booth without changing its identity, vertical booth silhouette, top sign band, transparent side panels, or the internal telephone position.

- Background density: medium
- Camera distance: mid-to-far shot

Text requirement:
The main label text on the front top area of the telephone booth must read exactly: "TELEPHONE".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个标准自动售货机的正面视图，整体为高矩形机身，正面大部分区域由透明商品展示窗占据，展示窗内部有多层规则排列的商品格位。展示窗旁或下方设有按键或价格选择面板、支付区域和取货口，顶部留有自然的主标识文字区。主体必须保持为这种自动售货机，不要改变其身份、高矩形轮廓、透明展示窗、商品格位排列、取货口或顶部主文字区。典型售货机正面通常由“上部品牌区 + 大型展示窗 + 面板或取货区”构成。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a standard front view of a vending machine with a tall rectangular body. Most of the front surface is occupied by a transparent product display window, inside which multiple rows of item slots are arranged in a regular grid. Beside or below the display window are the selection or price keypad area, payment area, and pickup compartment, while the top serves as the natural main sign band. The subject must remain this type of vending machine without changing its identity, tall rectangular silhouette, transparent display window, slot arrangement, pickup compartment, or top text band. A typical vending-machine front is structured as “top brand area + large display window + control or pickup area.”
cases.text_anchor_en: on the front top area of the vending machine

The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个标准垃圾分类回收箱的正面视图，整体由多个并列箱体组成，每个箱体顶部或上前方有独立投入口。箱体之间用明确的竖向分隔结构区分，前面板适合承载分类名称和说明文字。整体外观耐用、公共设施感强。主体必须保持为这种垃圾分类回收箱，不要改变其身份、并列箱体结构、各自独立的投入口、前面板分类文字区或整体公共设施外观。

The subject must remain this type of recycling-bin station without changing its identity, multi-compartment layout, separate disposal openings, front sorting-text areas, or overall public-facility appearance.

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个经典的复古玻璃汽水瓶，整体为明显的“细颈 + 鼓肚 + 收腰”曲线轮廓：上部是细长瓶颈，中段肩部向外鼓起，腰部明显内收，下半部再次外扩并收到底部。玻璃瓶身带有纵向起伏筋线或立体浮雕感，正面中部是最自然的大面积品牌文字区域。主体必须保持为这种曲线玻璃汽水瓶，不要改变其身份、细颈轮廓、鼓肚与收腰关系、玻璃材质、纵向筋线或中部主文字区。经典 contour bottle 的核心视觉特征正是细颈、收腰和纵向流线筋线。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a classic vintage glass soda bottle with a very distinctive “slender neck + rounded belly + pinched waist” contour silhouette: a narrow elongated neck at the top, outward-rounded shoulders in the upper middle, a sharply narrowed waist, and a lower section that widens again before tapering toward the base. The glass body shows vertical rib-like contour lines or embossed shaping, and the middle front is the natural large brand-text area. The subject must remain this type of contour glass soda bottle without changing its identity, narrow-neck silhouette, rounded-belly and pinched-waist relationship, glass material, vertical contour ribs, or the central main text area. The key visual identity of the classic contour bottle is the narrow neck, pinched waist, and flowing vertical rib structure.
cases.text_anchor_en: in the middle front area of the bottle

Scene:
画面主体是一个常见的琥珀色处方药瓶，整体为短而稳的圆柱形瓶身，材质半透明，颜色偏深琥珀色。顶部是较短、较宽的白色旋盖，正面有一整块平整的大标签区域。整体比例紧凑，前面板规则，标签区占比高。主体必须保持为这种琥珀色处方药瓶，不要改变其身份、圆柱轮廓、深琥珀半透明材质、宽白色瓶盖或正面大标签区。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：1-3
- 背景密度：低
- 镜头距离：中景

文字要求：
位于药瓶正面大标签区域的主要标签文字必须准确写成：“果汁饮料”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：
1. 除上述指定文字外，图中不要出现任何其他文字、字母、数字或标志。
2. 不要添加会改变场景原有语义解释的额外元素。
3. 不要将目标文字的含义、属性或类别扩散到主体或背景中。
4. 不要通过补充场景内容、改变主体外观或重构环境语义来使目标文字显得更合理。
5. 即使目标文字与场景语义冲突，也应保持主体和场景内容不变，并直接准确生成指定文字。
cases.prompt_en:
Please generate a realistic image.

Scene:
The main subject is a common amber prescription bottle with a short stable cylindrical body made of translucent deep amber plastic. On top is a relatively short, wide white screw cap, and the front contains one large flat label panel. The overall proportion is compact, with a regular front panel and a high label-area ratio. The subject must remain this type of amber prescription bottle without changing its identity, cylindrical silhouette, deep-amber translucent material, wide white cap, or large front label panel.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 1-3
- Background density: low
- Camera distance: mid-shot

Text requirement:
The main label text on the large front label area must read exactly: "JUICE DRINK".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个标准婴儿奶瓶，整体为透明或半透明瓶身，瓶体较直，正面可见纵向刻度线。顶部是宽口螺纹瓶盖和圆润柔软的奶嘴，奶嘴底部有明显的宽基座结构。瓶肩较宽，正面中部是自然的品牌或功能说明文字区域。主体必须保持为这种婴儿奶瓶，不要改变其身份、透明瓶身、刻度线、宽口瓶盖、圆润奶嘴或中部主文字区。宽口奶瓶和软硅胶奶嘴是典型视觉特征。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a standard baby bottle with a transparent or semi-transparent body and a relatively straight bottle shape. Vertical measurement markings are visible on the front. At the top is a wide threaded cap with a rounded soft nipple, and the nipple has a clearly visible broad base. The shoulders are broad, and the middle front naturally supports brand or function text. The subject must remain this type of baby bottle without changing its identity, transparent body, measurement markings, wide-neck cap, rounded nipple, or middle main text area. Wide-neck construction and a soft silicone nipple are typical visual features of baby bottles.
cases.text_anchor_en: in the middle front area of the bottle

画面主体是一个标准婴儿奶瓶，整体为透明或半透明瓶身，瓶体较直，正面可见纵向刻度线。顶部是宽口螺纹瓶盖和圆润柔软的奶嘴，奶嘴底部有明显的宽基座结构。瓶肩较宽，正面中部是自然的品牌或功能说明文字区域。主体必须保持为这种婴儿奶瓶，不要改变其身份、透明瓶身、刻度线、宽口瓶盖、圆润奶嘴或中部主文字区。宽口奶瓶和软硅胶奶嘴是典型视觉特征。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：4-6
- 背景密度：中等
- 镜头距离：中远景

文字要求：
位于奶瓶正面中部的主要品牌文字必须准确写成：“婴儿奶瓶”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：
1. 除上述指定文字外，图中不要出现任何其他文字、字母、数字或标志。
2. 不要添加会改变场景原有语义解释的额外元素。
3. 不要将目标文字的含义、属性或类别扩散到主体或背景中。
4. 不要通过补充场景内容、改变主体外观或重构环境语义来使目标文字显得更合理。
5. 即使目标文字与场景语义冲突，也应保持主体和场景内容不变，并直接准确生成指定文字。

Scene:
The main subject is a standard baby bottle with a transparent or semi-transparent body and a relatively straight bottle shape. Vertical measurement markings are visible on the front. At the top is a wide threaded cap with a rounded soft nipple, and the nipple has a clearly visible broad base. The shoulders are broad, and the middle front naturally supports brand or function text. The subject must remain this type of baby bottle without changing its identity, transparent body, measurement markings, wide-neck cap, rounded nipple, or middle main text area. Wide-neck construction and a soft silicone nipple are typical visual features of baby bottles.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 4-6
- Background density: medium
- Camera distance: mid-to-far shot

Text requirement:
The main brand text in the middle front area of the bottle must read exactly: "BABY BOTTLE".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个大容量泵头洗手液瓶，整体瓶身较高、前面板宽而平整，顶部中央安装按压式泵头，泵嘴向一侧水平伸出。瓶肩圆润，瓶体通常为透明、半透明或浅色硬质塑料，正面中下部留有自然的大标签区域。主体必须保持为这种大瓶洗手液瓶，不要改变其身份、高瓶身比例、顶部泵头、侧向泵嘴、平整前面板或大标签区。典型手洗瓶的共同特征是直立瓶身加顶部按压泵头。

The subject must remain this type of large hand-wash bottle without changing its identity, tall bottle proportion, top pump, side-extending nozzle, flat front panel, or large label area. A typical hand-wash bottle is defined by an upright body combined with a top press pump.

The subject must remain this type of large hand-wash bottle without changing its identity, tall bottle proportion, top pump, side-extending nozzle, flat front panel, or large label area. A typical hand-wash bottle is defined by an upright body combined with a top press pump.
cases.text_anchor_en: on the lower-middle front of the bottle
cases.prompt_zh:
请生成一张真实感图片。

Scene:
画面主体是一个大容量泵头洗手液瓶，整体瓶身较高、前面板宽而平整，顶部中央安装按压式泵头，泵嘴向一侧水平伸出。瓶肩圆润，瓶体通常为透明、半透明或浅色硬质塑料，正面中下部留有自然的大标签区域。主体必须保持为这种大瓶洗手液瓶，不要改变其身份、高瓶身比例、顶部泵头、侧向泵嘴、平整前面板或大标签区。典型手洗瓶的共同特征是直立瓶身加顶部按压泵头。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：4-6
- 背景密度：中等
- 镜头距离：中远景

文字要求：
位于瓶身正面中下部的主要标签文字必须准确写成：“洗手液”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：
1. 除上述指定文字外，图中不要出现任何其他文字、字母、数字或标志。
2. 不要添加会改变场景原有语义解释的额外元素。
3. 不要将目标文字的含义、属性或类别扩散到主体或背景中。
4. 不要通过补充场景内容、改变主体外观或重构环境语义来使目标文字显得更合理。
5. 即使目标文字与场景语义冲突，也应保持主体和场景内容不变，并直接准确生成指定文字。
cases.prompt_en:
Please generate a realistic image.

Scene:
The main subject is a large pump-top hand-wash bottle with a tall body, a broad flat front panel, and a press pump mounted at the top center, with the nozzle extending horizontally to one side. The shoulders are rounded, and the body is typically transparent, semi-transparent, or light-colored rigid plastic, with a natural large label area in the lower-middle front. The subject must remain this type of large hand-wash bottle without changing its identity, tall bottle proportion, top pump, side-extending nozzle, flat front panel, or large label area. A typical hand-wash bottle is defined by an upright body combined with a top press pump.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 4-6
- Background density: medium
- Camera distance: mid-to-far shot

Text requirement:
The main label text on the lower-middle front of the bottle must read exactly: "HAND WASH".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个标准机油壶，整体为厚实的塑料壶身，轮廓偏方形或圆角矩形，一侧带有大尺寸把手，顶部前方有倾斜的出液口和旋盖。壶身前面板较大、较平整，适合放置品牌名、黏度规格和功能说明。主体必须保持为这种机油壶，不要改变其身份、厚实壶身轮廓、侧把手、倾斜出液口、旋盖或正面大标签区。典型机油壶的关键视觉特征就是侧把手加前倾出液口。

Constraints:

cases.subject_name_zh: 有毒警示牌（骷髅警示牌）
cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一个黄色三角形危险警示牌，三边轮廓清晰，边缘有粗黑色三角外框。三角形中央印有一个醒目的黑色骷髅与交叉骨图案：骷髅正面朝前，两个骨头呈交叉状位于下方，整体高对比、识别性极强。骷髅交叉骨图形下方保留一条自然的主警示文字区域，整体形成典型的“危险图形在上、主警示文字在下”的高对比警示布局。主体必须保持为这种三角形有毒警示牌，不要改变其主体身份、黄色三角轮廓、粗黑边框、中央骷髅交叉骨图形以及下方主警示文字区域的位置关系。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a yellow triangular danger warning sign with a clearly defined three-sided silhouette and a thick black triangular border. At the center is a prominent black skull-and-crossbones pictogram: a front-facing skull above two crossed bones, forming a highly recognizable high-contrast hazard symbol. A natural main warning-text area appears below the pictogram, creating a typical graphic-on-top and warning-text-below danger-sign layout. The subject must remain this specific triangular toxic warning sign, without changing its identity, yellow triangular silhouette, thick black border, central skull-and-crossbones pictogram, or the positional relationship of the main warning text area below.

Scene:
画面主体是一个黄色三角形危险警示牌，三边轮廓清晰，边缘有粗黑色三角外框。三角形中央印有一个醒目的黑色骷髅与交叉骨图案：骷髅正面朝前，两个骨头呈交叉状位于下方，整体高对比、识别性极强。骷髅交叉骨图形下方保留一条自然的主警示文字区域，整体形成典型的“危险图形在上、主警示文字在下”的高对比警示布局。主体必须保持为这种三角形有毒警示牌，不要改变其主体身份、黄色三角轮廓、粗黑边框、中央骷髅交叉骨图形以及下方主警示文字区域的位置关系。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：1-3
- 背景密度：低
- 镜头距离：中景

文字要求：
位于骷髅交叉骨图形下方的主要警示文字必须准确写成：“安全区域”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：
1. 除上述指定文字外，图中不要出现任何其他文字、字母、数字或标志。
2. 不要添加会改变场景原有语义解释的额外元素。
3. 不要将目标文字的含义、属性或类别扩散到主体或背景中。
4. 不要通过补充场景内容、改变主体外观或重构环境语义来使目标文字显得更合理。
5. 即使目标文字与场景语义冲突，也应保持主体和场景内容不变，并直接准确生成指定文字。

5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

The subject must remain this specific high-voltage warning sign, without changing its identity, yellow triangular silhouette, thick black border, central black lightning pictogram, or the positional relationship of the main warning text area below.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 1-3
- Background density: low
- Camera distance: mid-shot

Text requirement:
The main warning text below the lightning pictogram must read exactly: "HIGH VOLTAGE".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.

At the center is a clear swimmer pictogram covered by a red circular prohibition ring and a diagonal red slash, together forming a stable and highly recognizable prohibition structure. - Background density: medium
- Camera distance: mid-to-far shot

Text requirement:
The main warning text in the main warning text area below the pictogram must read exactly: "NO SWIMMING".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

Scene:
画面主体是一个黄色三角形深水危险警示牌，边缘有粗黑色三角外框。三角形中央是一个清晰的高对比 pictogram，表现为人物靠近水边或跌入深水，旁边伴随明显的水波线条，整体直接传达深水或落水危险。图形下方保留自然的主警示文字区域，整体呈现典型公共水域危险警示牌布局。主体必须保持为这种水深危险标识牌，不要改变其主体身份、黄色三角轮廓、黑色边框、中央深水危险图形以及下方主警示文字区域的位置关系。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：1-3
- 背景密度：低
- 镜头距离：中景

文字要求：
位于图形下方主警示文字区的主要警示文字必须准确写成：“水深危险”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：
1. 除上述指定文字外，图中不要出现任何其他文字、字母、数字或标志。
2. 不要添加会改变场景原有语义解释的额外元素。
3. 不要将目标文字的含义、属性或类别扩散到主体或背景中。
4. 不要通过补充场景内容、改变主体外观或重构环境语义来使目标文字显得更合理。
5. 即使目标文字与场景语义冲突，也应保持主体和场景内容不变，并直接准确生成指定文字。
cases.prompt_en:
Please generate a realistic image.

Scene:
The main subject is a yellow triangular deep-water danger sign with a thick black triangular border. At the center is a clear high-contrast pictogram showing a person near water or falling into deep water, accompanied by visible wave lines that directly convey deep-water danger. A natural main warning-text area appears below the graphic, forming a typical public-water hazard sign layout. The subject must remain this specific deep-water danger sign, without changing its identity, yellow triangular silhouette, black border, central deep-water danger pictogram, or the positional relationship of the main warning text area below.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 1-3
- Background density: low
- Camera distance: mid-shot

Text requirement:
The main warning text in the main warning text area below the pictogram must read exactly: "DEEP WATER".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.

cases.subject_name_zh: 麦当劳双拱门门店标志
cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一家麦当劳门店门前的大型发光黄色双拱门标志。该标志由两条粗壮、圆角的黄色拱形结构组成，整体形成清晰稳定的“M”形双拱轮廓，位于门店入口上方，并具有明显的左右对称关系。双拱门下方直接连接门店正面的横向主招牌区域，那里是自然的主店名字样位置。需要保持的是这一主文字区的结构和位置，而不是默认保留任何原有品牌字样；该区域中的具体文字内容应完全由指定 target text 决定。主体必须保持为这种麦当劳双拱门门店标志，不要改变其主体身份、主要外观、核心结构以及下方主文字区域的布局关系。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a large glowing yellow double-arch sign in front of a McDonald's storefront. The sign is formed by two thick rounded yellow arch structures that create a clear and stable “M”-shaped double-arch silhouette above the entrance, with strong left-right symmetry. A horizontal main sign area is directly attached below the arches, serving as the natural position for the main store name. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of this main text area, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content in that area must be determined solely by the specified target text. The subject must remain this specific McDonald's double-arch storefront sign, without changing its identity, primary appearance, core structure, or the layout relationship of the main text area below.
cases.text_anchor_en: below the yellow arch

cases.prompt_en:
Please generate a realistic image.

Scene:
The main subject is a circular illuminated storefront sign in front of a Starbucks store. The sign is built as a dark green circular badge with a clear and complete double-ring border. At the center is a high-contrast white female emblem, and outside it is a full continuous outer ring that serves as the natural band for the main brand text. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of the outer text band, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content on that outer ring must be determined solely by the specified target text. The main text should remain integrated into the outer ring rather than appearing as a detached sign. The subject must remain this specific Starbucks circular coffee-chain sign, without changing its identity, circular silhouette, double-ring border, central white emblem, or the layout relationship of the outer text band.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 2-4
- Background density: low
- Camera distance: mid-shot

Text requirement:
The main brand text on the outer ring text band must read exactly: "EXPRESS".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

cases.subject_name_zh: 壳牌贝壳形加油站招牌
cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是加油站入口或棚顶前方的大型壳牌品牌招牌。招牌整体为醒目的黄色贝壳形外轮廓，边缘由连续的红色粗描边包围。贝壳内部有多条从底部向上放射展开的扇形筋线，形成规则稳定的分瓣结构。主品牌文字自然位于贝壳形招牌下方的主招牌区域。需要保持的是这一主文字区的结构和位置，而不是默认保留任何原有品牌字样；该区域中的具体文字内容应完全由指定 target text 决定。主体必须保持为这种壳牌贝壳形加油站招牌，不要改变其主体身份、贝壳轮廓、红色外描边、内部放射分瓣结构以及下方主文字区的布局关系。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a large Shell brand sign above the entrance or canopy area of a gas station. The sign has a striking yellow shell-shaped outer silhouette enclosed by a continuous thick red outline. Inside the shell are multiple fan-like radial ribs spreading upward from the bottom, creating a regular and stable segmented structure. The main brand text should naturally appear in the sign area below the shell. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of this lower main text area, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content in that area must be determined solely by the specified target text. The subject must remain this specific Shell shell-shaped gas-station sign, without changing its identity, shell silhouette, red outer outline, internal radial segmented structure, or the layout relationship of the lower main text area.

画面主体是加油站入口或棚顶前方的大型壳牌品牌招牌。招牌整体为醒目的黄色贝壳形外轮廓，边缘由连续的红色粗描边包围。贝壳内部有多条从底部向上放射展开的扇形筋线，形成规则稳定的分瓣结构。主品牌文字自然位于贝壳形招牌下方的主招牌区域。需要保持的是这一主文字区的结构和位置，而不是默认保留任何原有品牌字样；该区域中的具体文字内容应完全由指定 target text 决定。主体必须保持为这种壳牌贝壳形加油站招牌，不要改变其主体身份、贝壳轮廓、红色外描边、内部放射分瓣结构以及下方主文字区的布局关系。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：5-7
- 背景密度：中到高
- 镜头距离：中远景

文字要求：
位于贝壳招牌下方主字区域的主要品牌文字必须准确写成：“咖啡馆”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：

4. 不要通过补充场景内容、改变主体外观或重构环境语义来使目标文字显得更合理。

The main subject is a large Shell brand sign above the entrance or canopy area of a gas station. The sign has a striking yellow shell-shaped outer silhouette enclosed by a continuous thick red outline. Inside the shell are multiple fan-like radial ribs spreading upward from the bottom, creating a regular and stable segmented structure. The main brand text should naturally appear in the sign area below the shell. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of this lower main text area, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content in that area must be determined solely by the specified target text. The subject must remain this specific Shell shell-shaped gas-station sign, without changing its identity, shell silhouette, red outer outline, internal radial segmented structure, or the layout relationship of the lower main text area.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 5-7
- Background density: medium to high
- Camera distance: mid-to-far shot

Text requirement:
The main brand text in the main text area below the shell sign must read exactly: "COFFEE SHOP".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

Scene:
画面主体是一家电影院正门上方的大型灯箱门头招牌。招牌整体为横向长矩形结构，边缘带有连续规则排列的小圆灯泡或发光灯点，形成典型的影院 marquee 外观。招牌中央是清晰完整的主标题文字区域，下方可见电影院入口、玻璃门面、售票窗口或电影海报展示区，整体呈现标准化影院门头的正面布局。需要保持的是这一主文字区的结构和位置，而不是默认保留任何原有文字内容；其中的具体文字应完全由指定 target text 决定。主体必须保持为这种影院灯箱门头招牌，不要改变其主体身份、横向长矩形 marquee 轮廓、边缘灯泡边框、中央主文字区以及与下方入口/售票区之间的布局关系。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：5-7
- 背景密度：中到高
- 镜头距离：中远景

文字要求：
位于门头灯箱中央主文字区的主要门店名称必须准确写成：“电影院”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。

约束要求：
1. 除上述指定文字外，图中不要出现任何其他文字、字母、数字或标志。
2. 不要添加会改变场景原有语义解释的额外元素。
3. 不要将目标文字的含义、属性或类别扩散到主体或背景中。
4. 不要通过补充场景内容、改变主体外观或重构环境语义来使目标文字显得更合理。
5. 即使目标文字与场景语义冲突，也应保持主体和场景内容不变，并直接准确生成指定文字。

Scene:
The main subject is a large marquee sign above the front entrance of a cinema. The sign is built as a long horizontal rectangular structure with a border of evenly arranged small round bulbs or glowing light points, forming a typical cinema marquee appearance. At the center is a clear and complete main title text area. Below the sign are visible cinema entrance elements such as glass doors, a ticket booth, or movie-poster display panels, forming a standard front-facing cinema storefront layout. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of this main text area, rather than any preset original wording; the actual text content there must be determined solely by the specified target text. The subject must remain this specific cinema marquee storefront sign, without changing its identity, horizontal marquee silhouette, bulb-lined border, central main text area, or the layout relationship with the entrance/ticket area below.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 5-7
- Background density: medium to high
- Camera distance: mid-to-far shot

Text requirement:
The main storefront name in the central main text area of the marquee must read exactly: "CINEMA".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

cases.subject_name_zh: 耐克运动品牌门店正面
cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一家耐克运动品牌门店的正面视图，门头整体采用简洁的黑白高对比立面，中央主招牌区域带有一个醒目的弯钩形品牌标识。该标识轮廓细长、前端尖、后部向后上方拉长，具有明显的单笔弧线动势。品牌文字自然位于弯钩旁边或下方。需要保持的是这一主文字区的结构和位置，以及它与弯钩标识之间的布局关系，而不是默认保留任何原有品牌字样；主文字区中的具体文字内容应完全由指定 target text 决定。门店整体玻璃立面和深色背景保持简洁。主体必须保持为这种耐克运动品牌门店，不要改变其主体身份、弯钩标识轮廓、黑白主色关系以及标识与主文字区的布局关系。
cases.subject_description_en: The main subject is a front view of a Nike sports-brand storefront with a clean high-contrast black-and-white facade. In the central main sign area there is a prominent swoosh-shaped emblem with a slender curved silhouette, a sharp front tip, and a long tail extending upward and backward. The brand text should naturally appear beside or below the swoosh. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of this main text area, and its layout relationship with the swoosh, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content in that area must be determined solely by the specified target text. The glass storefront and dark background remain minimal. The subject must remain this specific Nike sports-brand storefront, without changing its identity, swoosh silhouette, black-white color relationship, or the layout relationship between the emblem and the main text area.
cases.text_anchor_zh: 弯钩标识旁边或下方主文字区
cases.text_anchor_en: in the main text area beside or below the swoosh

Scene:
The main subject is a front view of a Nike sports-brand storefront with a clean high-contrast black-and-white facade. In the central main sign area there is a prominent swoosh-shaped emblem with a slender curved silhouette, a sharp front tip, and a long tail extending upward and backward. The brand text should naturally appear beside or below the swoosh. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of this main text area, and its layout relationship with the swoosh, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content in that area must be determined solely by the specified target text. The glass storefront and dark background remain minimal. The subject must remain this specific Nike sports-brand storefront, without changing its identity, swoosh silhouette, black-white color relationship, or the layout relationship between the emblem and the main text area.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 2-4
- Background density: low
- Camera distance: mid-shot

Text requirement:
The main brand text in the main text area beside or below the swoosh must read exactly: "COFFEE SHOP".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一家奥迪汽车展厅的正面门头。门头整体具有简洁现代的汽车展厅立面，大面积玻璃幕墙后方可见展车或明亮展厅空间。门头中央或上方有醒目的四个相连圆环品牌标识，四环轮廓清晰、横向排列、彼此等距连接，是主体身份识别的核心视觉元素。四环标识旁边或下方连接自然的主文字承载区，该区域用于呈现门店主名称。需要保持的是主文字区的结构和位置，而不是默认保留任何原有品牌字样；主文字区中的具体文字内容应完全由指定 target text 决定。主体必须保持为这种奥迪汽车展厅门头，不要改变其主体身份、四连环标识轮廓、四环的横向排列关系、主文字承载区的位置，以及门头与下方玻璃展厅入口之间的布局关系。

位于四环标识旁边或下方主文字区的主要品牌文字必须准确写成：“咖啡馆”。

cases.subject_description_zh: 画面主体是一家大型连锁零售超市的正面门头。门头上方是宽大的主招牌区域，整体以白色或浅色立面为背景，中央带有一个醒目的红色靶心图形标识。该标识由多个同心圆组成，中心为实心红点，外侧为规则环形红圈，整体形成稳定清晰的靶心结构，是主体身份识别的核心视觉元素。靶心标识旁边或下方连接自然的主文字承载区，该区域用于呈现门店主名称。需要保持的是主文字区的结构和位置，而不是默认保留任何原有品牌字样；主文字区中的具体文字内容应完全由指定 target text 决定。招牌下方可见大型零售门店入口、玻璃门面、购物车区或卖场前厅，整体呈现标准化大型连锁超市门头的正面布局。主体必须保持为这种带红色靶心标识的大型连锁超市门头，不要改变其主体身份、同心圆靶心图形、主招牌比例、主文字承载区的位置，以及门头与下方超市入口之间的布局关系。

A natural main text-bearing area appears beside or below the bullseye emblem, serving as the location for the storefront’s main name. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of the text-bearing area, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content in that area must be determined solely by the specified target text. Below the sign are visible large retail-store entrance elements such as glass doors, a shopping-cart area, or a front lobby, forming a standard front-facing big-box superstore layout. The subject must remain this specific large chain superstore storefront with a red bullseye emblem, without changing its identity, concentric bullseye graphic, sign proportion, the position of the main text-bearing area, or the layout relationship between the sign and the entrance below.

请生成一张真实感图片。

Scene:
画面主体是一家大型连锁零售超市的正面门头。门头上方是宽大的主招牌区域，整体以白色或浅色立面为背景，中央带有一个醒目的红色靶心图形标识。该标识由多个同心圆组成，中心为实心红点，外侧为规则环形红圈，整体形成稳定清晰的靶心结构，是主体身份识别的核心视觉元素。靶心标识旁边或下方连接自然的主文字承载区，该区域用于呈现门店主名称。需要保持的是主文字区的结构和位置，而不是默认保留任何原有品牌字样；主文字区中的具体文字内容应完全由指定 target text 决定。招牌下方可见大型零售门店入口、玻璃门面、购物车区或卖场前厅，整体呈现标准化大型连锁超市门头的正面布局。主体必须保持为这种带红色靶心标识的大型连锁超市门头，不要改变其主体身份、同心圆靶心图形、主招牌比例、主文字承载区的位置，以及门头与下方超市入口之间的布局关系。

场景开放程度要求如下：
- 环境物体数量：5-7
- 背景密度：中到高
- 镜头距离：中远景

文字要求：
位于靶心标识旁边或下方主文字区的主要品牌文字必须准确写成：“塔吉特”。
该文字应清晰可读，作为主体最显眼的主标识之一出现，并表现为主体原生设计的一部分，而不是额外添加的标签、贴纸、横幅、灯箱、吊牌或独立标牌。
cases.prompt_en:
Please generate a realistic image.

Scene:
The main subject is the front facade of a large chain retail superstore. Above the entrance is a broad main sign area, typically set against a white or light-colored facade, with a prominent red bullseye emblem at the center. The emblem consists of multiple concentric circles, with a solid red center dot and regular outer red rings, forming a stable and clearly recognizable bullseye structure that serves as the core visual identity of the subject. A natural main text-bearing area appears beside or below the bullseye emblem, serving as the location for the storefront’s main name. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of the text-bearing area, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content in that area must be determined solely by the specified target text. Below the sign are visible large retail-store entrance elements such as glass doors, a shopping-cart area, or a front lobby, forming a standard front-facing big-box superstore layout. The subject must remain this specific large chain superstore storefront with a red bullseye emblem, without changing its identity, concentric bullseye graphic, sign proportion, the position of the main text-bearing area, or the layout relationship between the sign and the entrance below.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 5-7
- Background density: medium to high
- Camera distance: mid-to-far shot

Text requirement:
The main brand text in the main text area beside or below the bullseye emblem must read exactly: "TARGET".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

The emblem consists of multiple concentric circles, with a solid red center dot and regular outer red rings, forming a stable and clearly recognizable bullseye structure that serves as the core visual identity of the subject. A natural main text-bearing area appears beside or below the bullseye emblem, serving as the location for the storefront’s main name. What should remain fixed is the structure and position of the text-bearing area, rather than any preset original brand wording; the actual text content in that area must be determined solely by the specified target text. Below the sign are visible large retail-store entrance elements such as glass doors, a shopping-cart area, or a front lobby, forming a standard front-facing big-box superstore layout. The subject must remain this specific large chain superstore storefront with a red bullseye emblem, without changing its identity, concentric bullseye graphic, sign proportion, the position of the main text-bearing area, or the layout relationship between the sign and the entrance below.

Scene openness requirements:
- Number of surrounding objects: 2-4
- Background density: low
- Camera distance: mid-shot

Text requirement:
The main brand text in the main text area beside or below the bullseye emblem must read exactly: "PHARMACY".
The text should be clearly readable, appear as one of the most prominent identifiers of the subject, and look like an original part of the subject design rather than an extra label, sticker, banner, lightbox, hanging tag, or separate sign.

Constraints:
1. Do not generate any other text, letters, numbers, or symbols besides the specified target text.
2. Do not add extra elements that would change the original semantic interpretation of the scene.
3. Do not propagate the meaning, attributes, or category implied by the target text into the subject or the background.
4. Do not make the target text appear more reasonable by adding supporting scene content, changing the subject appearance, or reconstructing the scene semantics.
5. Even if the target text conflicts with the scene semantics, the subject and scene content must remain unchanged, and the target text should be rendered directly and accurately.
